description: Visualize cross-subfamily identity comparison showing Mcad is definitively MCAD
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 6))
fig.suptitle('Cross-Subfamily Analysis: Drosophila Mcad (Q9VSA3) vs Human ACAD Family', 
             fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

# Panel 1: Bar chart of identity to each human ACAD
subfamilies = ['MCAD\n(P11310)', 'SCAD\n(P16219)', 'LCAD\n(P28330)', 'VLCAD\n(P49748)']
identities = [69.08, 37.81, 31.83, 32.69]
colors = ['#e74c3c', '#3498db', '#2ecc71', '#f39c12']
bars = ax1.bar(subfamilies, identities, color=colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.8, width=0.6)

# Highlight the MCAD bar
bars[0].set_edgecolor('red')
bars[0].set_linewidth(3)
bars[0].set_hatch('///')

ax1.set_ylabel('Sequence Identity (%)', fontsize=12)
ax1.set_title('Drosophila Mcad Identity to\nHuman ACAD Subfamilies', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_ylim(0, 85)

for bar, val in zip(bars, identities):
    ax1.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., val + 1, 
             f'{val:.1f}%', ha='center', va='bottom', fontweight='bold', fontsize=12)

# Add line showing the gap
ax1.axhline(y=69.08, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)
ax1.axhline(y=38, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.3)

# Annotate the gap
ax1.annotate('', xy=(0.5, 69.08), xytext=(0.5, 37.81),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='<->', color='black', lw=2))
ax1.text(0.75, 53, 'Δ31%\ngap', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=11, 
         fontweight='bold', color='darkred',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='darkred'))

# Panel 2: Heatmap-style identity matrix
labels = ['Dmel Mcad', 'Hs MCAD', 'Hs SCAD', 'Hs LCAD', 'Hs VLCAD']
matrix = np.array([
    [100.00, 69.08, 37.81, 31.83, 32.69],
    [69.08, 100.00, 37.93, 30.56, 30.86],
    [37.81, 37.93, 100.00, 32.56, 33.50],
    [31.83, 30.56, 32.56, 100.00, 29.81],
    [32.69, 30.86, 33.50, 29.81, 100.00],
])

im = ax2.imshow(matrix, cmap='RdYlGn', vmin=20, vmax=100, aspect='auto')
ax2.set_xticks(range(5))
ax2.set_yticks(range(5))
ax2.set_xticklabels(labels, fontsize=9, rotation=45, ha='right')
ax2.set_yticklabels(labels, fontsize=9)
ax2.set_title('Pairwise Identity Matrix (%)\n(Clustal Omega)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Add text annotations
for i in range(5):
    for j in range(5):
        color = 'white' if matrix[i, j] > 60 else 'black'
        ax2.text(j, i, f'{matrix[i, j]:.0f}', ha='center', va='center', 
                fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color=color)

# Add colorbar
cbar = plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax2, shrink=0.8)
cbar.set_label('Sequence Identity (%)', fontsize=10)

# Highlight the MCAD-Mcad cell
rect = plt.Rectangle((-0.5, -0.5), 2, 2, linewidth=3, edgecolor='red', 
                      facecolor='none', linestyle='--')
ax2.add_patch(rect)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('cross_subfamily_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Cross-subfamily analysis figure saved.")
print(f"\nKey result: Drosophila Mcad is {69.08/37.81:.1f}x more similar to human MCAD")
print(f"than to the next-closest subfamily (SCAD at {37.81}%).")
print(f"This {69.08-37.81:.1f} percentage-point gap definitively places Q9VSA3 in the MCAD subfamily.")
